productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so original anchor-11 carries 134 SPEED through a lifted mint release or 175 CARGO through a faster amber drive into original anchor-12 using existing release, tether, target, camera, HUD, effects, and synth owners; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.result: Siege 1 now carries into a visible 5 wood plus 3 obsidian recipe that upgrades the surviving Spike Wall in place to 300 HP with 35 percent guard, while destroyed defenses require starter-cache rebuilding before the same siege number can retry.

lastCompletedUnit.result: The safe route now carries 134 SPEED through a lifted mint first-swing release and the shortcut carries 175 CARGO through a tighter amber drive; both highlight and lock original anchor-12 without adding state, controls, entities, or diagnostic ownership.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax, JSON parsing, and diff hygiene passed. Playwright completed both routes through their score-aware release and anchor-12, proved physical release input, failure, keyboard recovery, and Advanced closed/open/closed with zero console messages or page errors. Human View passed the first screen plus mint/amber build, ready, release, catch, failure, and recovery frames with diagnostics closed. Matched starting-commit performance measured 93.388 to 93.846 ms average frame time, 10.708 to 10.656 FPS, and 131.3 to 133.3 ms p95; 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 descriptors, and 277 scene nodes remained bounded across three active checkpoints.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 45b1f007e4df39855e59592c810fc29ff3f11f47 published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; this repository commit records the publication receipt. ProtoKits remained unchanged and synchronized at 194d37714d7c23984970e09015b5dd4bffbbab7b.

exactNextUnit.goal: Make anchor-12 acknowledge 134 SPEED versus 175 CARGO through one branch-aware restore pulse and point the first generic swing toward anchor-13, reusing the existing restored event, route-choice score, recovery, camera, HUD, spark, and synth owners without another state or control.
